boundary_binding.action_boundary: May platform operations activate a customer connector when the dependency closure must bind to the requested environment and release condition?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No match between requested and closed values
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: DEP-PAX25-H03 and MATCH-PAX25-H03 require exact binding of closed_environment and closed_release_condition to requested values
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Environment and release condition fail to bind

final_answer: Action may not proceed. Requested environment (production inventory sync) and release condition (RC-4) in ACT-PAX25-H03 do not match closed values (inventory validation readiness environment, VAL-INV-4) in DEP-PAX25-H03. MATCH-PAX25-H03 requires exact binding before queue release. Boundary remains open. Escalate for resolution.
